title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a small core supporting read, write, edit, and bash operations, where additional functionality is added via custom extensions. It works with multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, and offers an alternative to frontier model APIs with strict rate limits.
